steps.action: Open http://localhost:3200 at 1280x600 with the terminal demo below the fold
steps.expected: Demo remains idle before entering the viewport
steps.observed: At scrollY=0 the terminal region was off-screen (top=1464px, height=449px) and the tabpanel text was only '$' (length=1).

steps.action: Scroll until 43.7% of the terminal region is visible using selector div[aria-label='Animated terminal demo showing mktg CLI output']
steps.expected: Animation should still not start below the 50% IntersectionObserver threshold
steps.observed: At scrollY=1060 the visible ratio was 0.437 and the tabpanel text stayed '$' (length=1).

steps.action: Scroll until 57.1% of the terminal region is visible and wait 900ms
steps.expected: Typewriter animation should begin once the region is at least 50% visible
steps.observed: At scrollY=1120 the visible ratio was 0.571 and the tabpanel text expanded to 89 chars ('$mktg initBootstrapping…'), confirming animation start on entry.

steps.action: After the demo rendered, scroll away to the top and back to the same position
steps.expected: Re-intersection should not restart the animation
steps.observed: After re-entry at visible ratio 0.516, the tabpanel remained at 508 chars instead of resetting to '$', so the animation did not restart.

evidence.network: GET / -> 200 OK via curl; no relevant XHR/fetch requests observed for this static flow

selectors.terminalRegion: div[aria-label='Animated terminal demo showing mktg CLI output']

steps.action: Set viewport to 375x812 and load the page, then scroll to the terminal demo
steps.expected: Terminal should fit the mobile layout without page-level horizontal overflow
steps.observed: document.documentElement.scrollWidth was 375px, matching window.innerWidth=375px, so no horizontal overflow occurred.

steps.action: Measure the terminal container and tablist bounds
steps.expected: Terminal should take the full content width on mobile
steps.observed: The terminal region measured 343px wide from left=16px to right=359px, filling the mobile content column with the expected 16px side gutters.

steps.action: Inspect terminal font sizing and tab hit areas
steps.expected: Terminal font should be at least 12px and all three tabs should remain visible/tappable
steps.observed: The tabpanel font-size was 12px; the three tabs remained visible with widths of 100px each and heights of 58px each (ids terminal-demo-tab-init/status/doctor).

evidence.network: GET / -> 200 OK via curl; no relevant XHR/fetch requests observed for this static flow

selectors.terminalRegion: div[aria-label='Animated terminal demo showing mktg CLI output']

assertions.title: Accessibility — reduced motion, ARIA, and keyboard

steps.action: Emulate prefers-reduced-motion: reduce, load the page at 1280x800, and scroll the demo to 63.6% visibility
steps.expected: Typewriter animation should be skipped and full content should render immediately
steps.observed: window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches was true; after 150ms at visible ratio 0.636, the tabpanel already contained 508 chars of full output and getComputedStyle(tabpanel).animationName was 'none'.

steps.action: Inspect the terminal region accessibility tree
steps.expected: Three tabs should expose role=tab + aria-selected, the content area should expose role=tabpanel + aria-labelledby, and the terminal region should have a descriptive aria-label
steps.observed: Found 3 role='tab' elements with aria-selected states and roving tabindex (0/-1); the panel exposed id='terminal-demo-panel' with aria-labelledby='terminal-demo-tab-init'; the container aria-label was 'Animated terminal demo showing mktg CLI output'.

steps.action: Focus the active tab and press ArrowRight
steps.expected: Keyboard arrow navigation should switch the active tab
steps.observed: ArrowRight moved focus/selection from terminal-demo-tab-init to terminal-demo-tab-status; status became aria-selected='true' and tabindex='0'.

steps.action: Focus terminal-demo-tab-doctor and press Space, then focus terminal-demo-tab-init and press Enter
steps.expected: Focused tabs should be activatable with Space and Enter
steps.observed: Space selected terminal-demo-tab-doctor and updated aria-labelledby to terminal-demo-tab-doctor; Enter re-selected terminal-demo-tab-init and updated aria-labelledby back to terminal-demo-tab-init. No animated descendants were present in reduced-motion mode.

evidence.network: GET / -> 200 OK via curl; no relevant XHR/fetch requests observed for this static flow
